---
name: e2e-ui-conventions
description: UI E2E authoring conventions. Injected when the agent touches UI test files, so API work never receives UI page-object rules and vice versa.
paths:
  - "fixtures/**"
  - "pages/**"
  - "tests/**/*.spec.js"
  - "tests/**/*.spec.ts"
  - "workspace/tests/e2e-ui-tests-1/fixtures/**"
  - "workspace/tests/e2e-ui-tests-1/pages/**"
  - "workspace/tests/e2e-ui-tests-1/tests/**"
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by bin/gen_path_skills.py — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
     Conventions live in skills/e2e-ui-conventions/SKILL.md;
     the path globs are derived from registry test_repositories. -->
# UI E2E Conventions
- Selectors: data-testid only. If a needed testid is missing in the app, do NOT invent
  a CSS chain — record it in open_questions (app change needed).
- Page objects live in pages/; one class per screen; tests never call page.locator directly.
- Waits: web-first assertions (expect(...).toBeVisible()); never hard sleeps.
- One user journey per spec file; independent tests (no ordering deps).
- Tag every test with @<JIRA-KEY> and the domain tag (@checkout, @catalog...).
